title: dryopteris praetervisa
intro: Dryopteris praetervisa, also known as the lesser shield fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris praetervisa include its potential to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is said to have various medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
